subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Call of thy Lord from the direction of the Throne, that verily there is none other God but Him, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting. Say: O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ندآء ربک عن جهه العرش علی انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم قل یا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
